hero.title: Professional cleaning for your
hero.subtitle: Deep cleaning of homes and reliable periodic office cleaning. Clean, fast and with a guarantee.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Professional cleaning tailored to your needs — for individuals and businesses

residential.title: Deep Cleaning of Homes
residential.description: For individuals who dream of a perfectly clean home without effort.
items: Thorough cleaning of bathroom and toilet (descaling tiles and taps)
Kitchen degreasing: oven, extractor hood and cabinets
Dust removal from all walls, ceilings, skirting boards and lamps
Thorough vacuuming and deep cleaning of hard floors with steam

commercial.title: Office Cleaning on Contract Basis
commercial.description: Flexible and reliable cleaning service for your workplace.

features.title: Flexible scheduling
features.desc: We work outside office hours (early morning, evenings or weekends) so your employees can work undisturbed.

features.title: Continuity guarantee
features.desc: In case of illness or leave, we immediately arrange a replacement. Your office will always be cleaned.

features.title: Professional handling
features.desc: Professional cooperation based on a clear contract. Invoicing afterwards with VAT specification.

features.title: All-in-one service
features.desc: We bring all our own professional equipment and high-quality cleaning products. You don't have to worry about anything.

commercial.noCallout: No call-out charges within 15 km of Veghel!

results.title: Before & After
results.subtitle: See our work. Real results from satisfied customers.

region.title: Our Service Area
region.subtitle: Based in Veghel, active within 25 km radius
region.description: We serve Veghel and the entire region, including Eindhoven, 's-Hertogenbosch, Uden, Oss and Helmond. No call-out charges within 15 km of Veghel.
